meta.description: Intimacy building positions with three couple variants per position: him & her, her & her, him & him. Premium-only with weekly releases.
meta.releaseSchedule: 10 positions at launch (releaseWeek 0), then 1 new position per week
meta.inclusivity: Every position includes three variant descriptions so all couples see themselves represented. The default Partner A / Partner B setup remains as a universal fallback.

variants.him-her: Tailored for male-female couples
variants.her-her: Tailored for female-female couples
variants.him-him: Tailored for male-male couples

items.title: The Lotus
items.focus: A seated face-to-face position that prioritizes skin-to-skin closeness, sustained eye contact, and synchronized breathing.
items.setup: Partner A sits upright with legs crossed or extended. Partner B sits in their lap facing them, wrapping their legs around Partner A's waist. Both torsos stay upright, arms free to embrace.
items.whyItWorks: Maximizes closeness with minimal physical strain. The face-to-face intimacy slows the pace and deepens emotional connection.

variants.him-her: He sits upright with legs crossed or extended. She sits in his lap facing him, wrapping her legs around his waist. Both torsos stay upright, arms free to embrace.
variants.her-her: One partner sits upright with legs crossed. The other sits in her lap facing her, wrapping her legs around her waist. Arms free to embrace, foreheads close.
variants.him-him: One partner sits upright with legs crossed. The other sits in his lap facing him, wrapping his legs around his waist. Arms free to embrace, foreheads close.

items.title: The Slow Melt
items.focus: A side-lying position where one partner nestles behind the other, creating full-body contact from chest to feet.
items.setup: Both partners lie on the same side. Partner A presses close behind Partner B, chest to back, hips aligned. Arms wrap around naturally. Legs can intertwine for extra closeness.
items.whyItWorks: Full-body contact with zero performance pressure. The big spoon/little spoon dynamic creates warmth and a deep sense of safety.

variants.him-her: He nestles behind her, chest to back, hips aligned. His arms wrap around her naturally. Legs intertwine for closeness.
variants.her-her: One partner nestles behind the other, chest to back, hips aligned. Arms wrap around naturally. Legs intertwine for closeness.
variants.him-him: One partner nestles behind the other, chest to back, hips aligned. Arms wrap around naturally. Legs intertwine for closeness.

items.title: The Compass
items.focus: Partner on top faces away, offering a completely different angle and sense of independence while staying deeply connected.
items.setup: Partner A lies back comfortably. Partner B straddles them facing their feet, leaning forward slightly for balance. Hands can rest on Partner A's legs or the bed.
items.whyItWorks: The reversed angle changes sensation entirely. The top partner controls the pace and depth, while the visual for both is fresh and exciting.

variants.him-her: He lies back. She straddles him facing his feet, leaning forward slightly for balance. Her hands rest on his legs or the bed.
variants.her-her: One partner lies back. The other straddles her facing her feet, leaning forward. Hands rest on her partner's legs for balance. Use toys as desired.
variants.him-him: One partner lies back. The other straddles him facing his feet, leaning forward slightly. Hands rest on his partner's legs for balance.

items.title: The Harbor
items.focus: A classic from-behind position on all fours that offers deep connection through rhythm and trust.
items.setup: Partner B positions themselves on hands and knees. Partner A kneels behind them, hands resting on Partner B's hips or lower back. Both find a shared rhythm.
items.whyItWorks: The angle allows deep physical connection while the from-behind position builds trust. Partner A can lean forward for closeness or stay upright for control.

variants.him-her: She positions herself on hands and knees. He kneels behind her, hands on her hips or lower back. Both find a shared rhythm.
variants.her-her: One partner is on hands and knees. The other kneels behind her, hands on her hips. Use hands or toys to connect. Both find a shared rhythm.
variants.him-him: One partner is on hands and knees. The other kneels behind him, hands on his hips or lower back. Both find a shared rhythm.

items.title: The Bridge
items.focus: One partner arches upward in a bridge while the other moves on top — a dynamic position that builds strength and trust.
items.setup: Partner A lies on their back, plants their feet, and lifts their hips into a bridge. Partner B straddles them on top. Partner A's elevated hips create a unique angle.
items.whyItWorks: The bridge angle changes sensation dramatically. It requires core engagement from one partner and balance from the other — turning intimacy into a shared physical challenge.

variants.him-her: He lies back, plants his feet, and lifts his hips into a bridge. She straddles him on top. His elevated hips create a unique angle.
variants.her-her: One partner lifts into a bridge position. The other straddles her on top, using hands or toys. The elevated hips create a unique angle.
variants.him-him: One partner lifts into a bridge position. The other straddles him on top. The elevated hips create a unique angle and deeper connection.

items.title: The Whisper
items.focus: One partner lies flat on their stomach while the other lies on top from behind — maximum skin contact with minimal effort.
items.setup: Partner B lies flat on their stomach, legs together or slightly apart. Partner A lies on top from behind, chest against Partner B's back. Mouths naturally fall near ears for whispered words and breath.
items.whyItWorks: Full-body weight and contact creates an enveloping sensation. The prone angle is deeply intimate, and the ear-to-mouth proximity makes every breath and sound amplified.

variants.him-him: One partner lies on his stomach. The other lies on top from behind, chest to back. Mouth near his ear for whispered words and breath.

items.title: The Mirror
items.focus: Both partners simultaneously give and receive pleasure, creating a mirrored loop of mutual attention.
items.setup: Partners lie in opposite directions — one's head at the other's feet. Both can be on their sides (more relaxed) or one on top. Each focuses on pleasuring the other at the same time.
items.whyItWorks: Simultaneous giving and receiving breaks the usual turn-taking pattern. The mirrored symmetry means neither partner is purely active or passive.

variants.her-her: They lie in opposite directions, head to feet. Both give and receive oral pleasure simultaneously. Side-lying is the most relaxed option.
variants.him-him: They lie in opposite directions, head to feet. Both give and receive oral pleasure simultaneously. Side-lying is the most relaxed option.

variants.him-her: He lies on his back. She straddles him sitting upright, controlling speed, depth, and angle. His hands are free to roam her body.

variants.him-him: One partner lies on his back. The other straddles him, sitting upright, controlling speed and depth. Hands are free to explore.

items.title: The Drift

variants.him-him: One partner lies flat on his stomach. The other lies on top, both bodies relaxed and flat. Movement is slow and minimal.

items.title: The Pulse

variants.him-him: They stand face to face. One wraps a leg around the other's hip. A wall behind helps with balance and support.
